2026-04-02.original_title: Gemma 4 Is Being Tested on Arena Under the Name "significant-otter"
2026-04-02.original_content:
Gemma 4 Is Being Tested on Arena Under the Name "significant-otter"

The model identified itself as "I am Gemma 4, a large language model developed by Google DeepMind." Release is being called imminent. 

Lineup: 2B, 4B, and 120B15A.
2026-04-02.chinese_title: 谷歌Gemma 4大模型现身LMSYS Arena测试，发布在即
2026-04-02.summary: 谷歌DeepMind正在LMSYS Arena平台测试新一代大模型Gemma 4，测试代号为"significant-otter"。该模型在测试中自称为"我是Gemma 4，由谷歌DeepMind开发的大语言模型"，表明发布时间已临近。本次Gemma 4系列将包含三个参数版本：2B、4B以及120B15A的大参数版本。
2026-04-02.extension: Gemma 4的发布将进一步丰富开源大模型生态，可能对现有开源模型市场格局产生影响，同时也将为开发者提供更多模型选择。
